title: euploca axillaris
intro: Euploca axillaris, also known as the thorny ironwort or Mexican ironweed, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Euploca axillaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Euploca axillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
